title: Pharaoh artefact-catalog tailoring file
description: Validates the structure of .pharaoh/project/artefact-catalog.yaml. Top-level keys are artefact-type tokens (e.g. gd_req, wp, wf). Each value describes the expected sphinx-needs fields for that type.
$comment: The lifecycle array values are validated against workflows.lifecycle_states by pharaoh-tailor-review cross-file rule C2. Every top-level key must also appear in id-conventions.yaml prefixes (C1).

required_fields.description: sphinx-needs option keys that must be present in every need of this type.

optional_fields.description: sphinx-needs option keys that may be present. Must not overlap with required_fields (enforced by pharaoh-tailor-review C5).

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle states applicable to this artefact type. Values must be declared in workflows.lifecycle_states (enforced by pharaoh-tailor-review C2).

required_body_sections.description: Section headers that must appear in the RST body of every need of this type.
